basic_details.job_title: NHAI Geotechnical Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) has released the official Geotechnical Engineer Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NHAI Geotechnical Engineer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 55 years with a qualification of Graduate in Civil Engineering or equivalent and Post Graduate in Geotechnical Engineering / Soil Mechanics / Rock Mechanics or equivalent can apply online before 14 August 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Civil Engineering or equivalent, Post Graduate in Geotechnical Engineering / Soil Mechanics / Rock Mechanics or equivalent
qualification.details: Graduate in Civil Engineering or equivalent. Post Graduate in Geotechnical Engineering / Soil Mechanics / Rock Mechanics or equivalent is desirable.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHAI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHAI Geotechnical Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NHAI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NHAI Geotechnical Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHAI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHAI Geotechnical Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHAI Geotechnical Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NHAI Geotechnical Engineer position is 14th August 2026. Ensure you submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Geotechnical Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Civil Engineering or an equivalent qualification. A Post Graduate degree in Geotechnical Engineering, Soil Mechanics, or Rock Mechanics is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Geotechnical Engineer post is 55 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for NHAI Geotechnical Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the information available.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Geotechnical Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Geotechnical Engineer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 3,50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Geotechnical Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the post of Geotechnical Engineer in the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the NHAI Geotechnical Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Geotechnical Engineer position involves a scrutiny or screening of applications, followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this NHAI recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Geotechnical Engineer post is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the NHAI located?
faq.answer: The NHAI is located in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the NHAI Geotechnical Engineer recruitment must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.
